latestNews.alt: Golden scissors cutting a red ribbon on a blue background, symbolizing inauguration, grand opening, or new beginnings
latestNews.title: Rialtes Technologies Opens New Sales Office in Baddi, Himachal Pradesh.
latestNews.description: Baddi, Himachal Pradesh – April 3, 2025 – Rialtes Technologies, a leading global consulting firm, has announced the grand opening of its new Sales Office in Baddi, Himachal Pradesh, marking a significant step in the company’s expansion strategy. The new office aims to strengthen its presence in the northern part of India, while exploring the immense potential of the region's manufacturing sector.

This milestone marks a significant advancement in Rialtes’ mission to provide cutting-edge data and AI solutions to enterprise clients, particularly those leveraging SAP and Salesforce Platforms.
